title: Folders
scope: Hierarchical folders for organizing entities (documents, links, projects) with tags, icons, colors, soft delete, and breadcrumbs, plus an LLM intelligence pipeline that extracts facts + embeddings from each folder's contents for chat-grounded retrieval. NOT the documents themselves (the Documents app owns those) — Folders organizes them.

specs.title: Create a folder
specs.behavior: Creating a folder records a new container (with name, tags, icon, color) for organizing documents and artifacts.

specs.title: Get a folder
specs.behavior: Getting a folder returns its details and contents.

specs.title: List folders
specs.behavior: Listing returns folders, optionally filtered by owner.

specs.title: Search folders
specs.behavior: Searching matches folders by name, description, or tags.

specs.title: Delete a folder
specs.behavior: Deleting soft-deletes a folder; its contents survive as standalone documents and its sub-folders become root-level.

specs.title: Restore a folder
specs.behavior: Restoring brings back a previously deleted folder.

specs.title: Add to a folder
specs.behavior: Adding places an existing document or artifact into a folder, triggering the folder's intelligence pipeline.

specs.title: Create a doc in a folder
specs.behavior: Creating-in-folder makes a new document and adds it to the folder in one step.

specs.title: Remove from a folder
specs.behavior: Removing takes a document or artifact out of a folder without deleting it.

specs.title: Move between folders
specs.behavior: Moving relocates a document or artifact from one folder to another.
